scope: Default CE before/after only; CCE composition rows are raw artifacts, not headline comparisons.

gemma4_base_boundary_rows.scope: Gemma4 E2B on v5litepod-4 and Gemma4 E4B on v5litepod-8; LoRA rank 16, batch 1, max length 2048; activation policy none vs split_offload plus split_remat diagnostic; quality evaluation disabled.

small_model_followup.scope: Gemma3 270M on v5litepod-1 and Gemma3 1B on v5litepod-4; CCE + Tiled MLP + Splash Attention requested; activation policy none vs split_offload. Long-context OOM logs still expose dense attention allocations, so these are adapter-coverage diagnostics.
